import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn get_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn tok_eq(_ input: String, _ a_start: Int, _ a_stop: Int, _ b_start: Int, _ b_stop: Int) -> Bool
  string.substring(input, a_start, a_stop) == string.substring(input, b_start, b_stop)
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut starts: List<Int> = []
mut stops: List<Int> = []

mut i = 0
while i < n
  while i < n and is_ws_at(input, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i < n
    let s = i
    while i < n and not is_ws_at(input, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    starts = list.push(starts, s)
    stops = list.push(stops, i)
  end
end

let total = starts.len()
mut best_idx = -1
mut best_count = 0

mut t = 0
while t < total
  let si = get_at(starts, t)
  let ei = get_at(stops, t)

  mut first = true
  mut j = 0
  while j < t
    let sj = get_at(starts, j)
    let ej = get_at(stops, j)
    if tok_eq(input, si, ei, sj, ej)
      first = false
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  if first
    mut count = 0
    mut k = 0
    while k < total
      let sk = get_at(starts, k)
      let ek = get_at(stops, k)
      if tok_eq(input, si, ei, sk, ek)
        count = count + 1
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    if count > best_count
      best_count = count
      best_idx = t
    end
  end

  t = t + 1
end

let bs = get_at(starts, best_idx)
let be = get_at(stops, best_idx)
let token = string.substring(input, bs, be)
println("top=#{token}=#{best_count}")
